title: Find a Job
text:
We take enormous pride in our talented staff, world-class research facilities, benefits, and results that positively impact our local, national, and global communities.
Be sure to read through our hiring process to learn about submissions, interviews, application status, and more. Current NLR employees should apply through NLR's intranet site, theSOURCE.
Note: NLR does not accept candidate submissions from unsolicited third parties, such as recruiters or headhunters. These applications will not be considered, nor will a contractual relationship be formed by the submission.
